overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a dystopian cyberpunk city with heavy orange atmospheric haze. The player exits a covered neon-lit corridor into a sprawling urban plaza filled with pedestrians, futuristic architecture, and massive holographic advertisements, then navigates through busy streets and waterfront promenades.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the enclosed corridor with illuminated handrails and digital posters

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying a woman with text FEEL THE GRAVITY in purple and yellow
overhead concrete structure of the covered walkway with embedded lighting
continuous yellow-orange LED light strip running along the right wall at waist height
illuminated advertising display showing colorful graphics on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow enclosed pedestrian corridor with warm artificial lighting. Neon signs and digital billboards line the walls, including a prominent 'FEEL THE GRAVITY' advertisement. The camera moves forward steadily along the concrete walkway, passing illuminated handrails on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban plaza with pagoda-style information kiosk

events.description: exits the covered corridor into the open urban plaza with heavy orange atmospheric haze
natural orange sunlight becomes visible through the haze as the camera approaches the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza toward the street intersection, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking across the plaza in the same direction

entered.detail: traditional-asian-inspired black information booth with glowing screens and pagoda roof
massive towering structure with multiple levels and suspended platforms visible through the haze
tall building with prominent red CORP NATION signage illuminated on the facade
decorative tree with pink illuminated foliage on the right side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the corridor, the scene opens into a vast urban plaza bathed in orange haze. A distinctive pagoda-style kiosk stands in the center while the CORP NATION building looms on the right. Pedestrians walk through the plaza as the camera approaches the street intersection, with the lighting shifting from artificial neon to the warm natural glow filtering through the smog.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy city intersection with marked crosswalks and traffic signals

events.description: crossing the street at the yellow-striped crosswalk with a group of pedestrians
turns right to follow the sidewalk along the main road, passing futuristic traffic lights

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street at the crosswalk and continuing along the sidewalk, weaving through pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians crossing the street together in the same direction

entered.detail: futuristic black traffic signal structure with illuminated pedestrian crossing sign
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
large glowing green holographic display showing product advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the wide city street at the marked crosswalk, surrounded by other pedestrians. Futuristic traffic poles with digital displays line the intersection. After crossing, the camera turns right along the sidewalk, passing the CORP NATION building which grows larger on the right, while holographic advertisements glow green against the orange haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with palm trees and towering vertical billboards

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the massive cant_fly billboards and skyscrapers towering overhead

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade while looking up at the massive architecture and billboards overhead

entered.detail: tall palm tree with green fronds lining the left side of the promenade
low barrier separating the walkway from the water visible on the right side
massive vertical digital billboard displaying CANT FLY text with cartoon character graphics
ground-level commercial space with bright neon signage and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Walking along the waterfront promenade, the scene features palm trees on the left and a railing overlooking water on the right. The camera tilts upward to reveal massive vertical billboards including one with 'CANT FLY' text plastered on the towering skyscrapers. The orange haze creates a dramatic backlit silhouette of the futuristic architecture overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with ground-level shops and illuminated signage

agents.ego_description: approaching a storefront with a green neon OPEN sign, walking along the building facade

notable_agents.action: lone pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk in the distance

entered.detail: bright green neon sign with OPEN text above a shop entrance
glass doorway entrance to the commercial building straight ahead
large wall-mounted digital display showing colorful advertisements on the right building

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a commercial building entrance marked by a glowing green OPEN sign. The waterfront and palm trees fall behind as the camera moves into a more enclosed street canyon with digital poster walls on the right. The scene ends as the camera approaches the building entrance doors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, neon-lit corridor into a sprawling, smog-filled cyberpunk plaza. It begins by moving steadily along a narrow concrete walkway lined with artificial lighting and digital billboards, including a prominent FEEL THE GRAVITY advertisement. As the camera emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens into a vast urban plaza where the artificial neon shifts into a warm, orange atmospheric haze surrounding a pagoda-style kiosk and the looming CORP NATION building. The movement then carries the camera across a wide city street at a marked crosswalk among pedestrians and digital traffic poles before turning right along the sidewalk. Finally, the perspective glides past the expanding facade of the CORP NATION building as green holographic advertisements glow vividly against the dense orange smog.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a hazy waterfront promenade that gradually transitions into a dense, enclosed urban street canyon. It begins by gliding past palm trees and a railing overlooking the water, with the camera tilting upward to reveal towering skyscrapers and massive vertical billboards, including one reading CANT FLY, silhouetted against a thick orange haze. As the camera moves forward, the open waterfront and greenery fall behind, and the environment shifts toward a more claustrophobic setting flanked by digital poster walls. The scene then narrows as the camera navigates the street canyon, finally approaching the entrance of a commercial building marked by a glowing green OPEN sign.
